scenario: Suite is flaky — same tests pass locally, fail intermittently in CI; want to triage before rerunning
when_to_pick: You have a flake incident and need to rank hypotheses before patching

scenario: Suite has 5000 unit tests and we don't trust them — want to know which ones actually catch bugs and which are theater
when_to_pick: You inherited a suite and want a credibility audit on the unit layer
